text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next day, Seiun Sky doesn't show up for
morning training. It seems she hasn't even come
to school...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've been using my head to win. Pretty
obvious, huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: If that's what you call thinking up waaay too many scenarios and how you'd deal with them...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm positive she's still trying to get better, so I
have to figure out something that can help her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Later that night, it's peaceful and quiet...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You're late. I thought you'd get here sooner.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Not a single one. All I've pulled up is seaweed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sound of gently breaking waves interrupts the
silence. Without a word, I cast my line beside
hers, and she begins to open up little by little.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Obviously, I wasn't being serious back there. I'm
not tired of racing.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I was just thinking... how am I supposed to
overcome all these obstacles and limitations I
have?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
How am I supposed to beat other Umamusume
who just keep getting better and better, when I'm
already at my peak?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
So I thought that if I went fishing... a good
strategy might come to mind.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Back there... I wasn't for real, you know?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hah. So you saw right through me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...I think King did too, at least a little. She's just
impatient.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But... I really am stuck.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Geez, fishing was pointless. I can't come up with
anything. I'm just staring at the water!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm through, I surrender, I'm waving the white flag!
...Not really.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm just... so played out.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: That's so played out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I remember when she said that before. Those
words were directed at herself—not at me or
anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Maybe it was high tide for me already. My time's
over and done with, so I should throw in the
towel!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's miraculous enough that someone as weak as
me could get this far.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I even ran in the Classics like Gramps always
wanted.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I should pat myself on the back and say, "Nice
job, kiddo!"

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... Right? I've already had a good enough
career!
choice_data_list: Right. You're one of the greats.
Right. You're one of the greats.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But... I can't forget it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
That moment when everyone's perception of me
changed.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The surprise, the commotion! The cheers and
screams! That moment the world turned upside
down!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I wanna feel that excitement one more time!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Even though I'll never snag another bite, I can't
forget that moment. So I keep casting my line.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: She asked if I don't want to win anymore...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Of course I still wanna win, duh. That's why I've
been running all this time.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But, you know... I don't know anymore.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's like there's a wall in front of me, with a sign on
it saying, "This is as far as you go."

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Up until now, I've been digging under or
clambering over the walls.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But it's clear there's no way for me to get past this
one. I'm afraid to even run toward it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I'm scared. I don't wanna know that it's
over for me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She turns her head down, but I catch a glimpse of
tears welling up in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though she always acted carefree, like
nothing ever affected her, she's always been
battling this uncertainty...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Nah... There's nothing for you to apologize for.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I'm the only one who can do anything about this...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
In the end, the only person you can rely on... is
yourself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's just what she said once before. Sure, it's
true that her own strength is what will carry her
forward, but...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Urgh! I can't even catch a damn fish...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Like, really! I'm such a loser right now.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Yup... And no matter how many times I cast my
line, I don't get a thing.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Huh? What do you—why are you walking into the
water? W-wait a sec!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splash!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Trainer, are you okay?!
choice_data_list: I'm going to herd the fish to you! Get the net!
I'm going to herd the fish to you Get the net!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: H-huh, w-wait, wha? Uh... okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I chase the fish toward where Sky is waiting, and
then...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Got a small fry.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I mean... does this really count as a catch? I didn't
even use my rod.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hold on a sec... Sorry, my thoughts are all over
the place.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: What... was that just now?
choice_data_list:
If you can be brave even when you're scared,
you can make a change!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh! So you dove into the sea to show me that?
Right... because...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Pfft... Ahaha! I don't understand you at all!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Haha, that's so not like you! Oh boy, you really
shocked me.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Like... you don't have to go to such extremes if
you just want to give me courage.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
How is what you did going to make this wall I'm
facing disappear?
choice_data_list: You haven't even tried knocking it down yet.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
choice_data_list: Be brave. I want you to knock it down.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But what if it doesn't work? What if this just
becomes a painful memory?
choice_data_list:
As powerful as you are now, you can definitely
break it down.

As powerful as you are now, you can definitely
break it down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hand her the materials I'd been compiling since
this morning.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
This is... my training record up until now? All the
races I ran up to the Takarazuka Kinen are in
here...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hah. You even wrote down all the times I
skipped? I definitely am a pain in your neck, huh?
choice_data_list: You still have plenty of surprises in you.
You still have plenty of surprises in you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'll start training again. But as for racing... I can't
promise anything.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I might get scared and run away... You okay with
that?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Can you let me be alone for a while? I promise
I'll be back before curfew.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure that Sky will grasp something from this.
Confident that she'll return to racing, I leave her
to her thoughts.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Psh... You believe in me, huh?
